description: A commercial client has engaged your firm to investigate a 25 kW rooftop PV system in Las Vegas, Nevada that is significantly underperforming in Year 4. Using the system specifications and observed annual production data from /home/ga/client_system_report.json, determine which combination of soiling loss and accelerated degradation best explains the observed Year 4 production. Model the system using SAM simulation tools and Las Vegas weather data, evaluating soiling loss percentages [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12] and annual degradation rates [0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9, 1.1, 1.3, 1.5] %/yr. Identify the best-fit combination based on
